role_summary: the compliance officer ensures adherence to regulatory, statutory, and internal compliance  requirements.
responsibilities: • monitor compliance with laws and regulations   • develop and update compliance policies and procedures   • conduct compliance audits and reviews   • handle regulatory filings and disclosures   • support regulatory inspections and audits   • train employees on compliance requirements
qualifications: • chartered accountant   • strong regulatory and  compliance knowledge   • attention to detail and governance orientation
